title: Febreze Air Freshener Spray OCEAN ESCAPE 185ml x 3 | Odour Eliminator with OdourClear Technology | Non-Flammable, Long-Lasting Room Freshener, Exotic Fruity Fragrance
features: 🌊 Pack of 3 x 185ml Ocean Escape Sprays – A cool, refreshing marine scent that lifts your space
💨 OdourClear Technology – Doesn’t mask odours; actively eliminates them for a fresh, clean feel
🍍 Exotic & Uplifting Fragrance – Inspired by tropical fruits for a burst of sweet, juicy freshness
🔥 Propellant-Free & Non-Flammable – Safe for use around the home, including kitchens and bathrooms
🇬🇧 Made in the UK – Trusted Febreze quality, suitable for homes with pets, kids, or sensitive noses
🏠 Versatile Room Use – Ideal for living rooms, kitchens, bathrooms, hallways, and more
description: Transform your space with the clean, refreshing scent of the sea using Febreze Air Mist Ocean Escape 185ml – Pack of 3 . Infused with OdourClear Technology , this spray doesn’t just mask smells – it eliminates them for good. Inspired by ocean breezes and fresh coastal air, Ocean Escape is perfect for bringing long-lasting freshness to every room in your home. The water-based, non-flammable formula makes it safe and easy to use every day. Includes 3 x 185ml Febreze Ocean Escape sprays Removes odours from cooking, pets, smoke, and more Clean aquatic scent leaves your home feeling bright and airy Safe, propellant-free spray ideal for all living spaces Trusted Febreze freshness in every bottle Febreze – eliminate odours, embrace the escape.
